overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path at night during light rain. The character traverses from an elevated stone walkway through open countryside with stone walls and distant ruins, maintaining a steady pace through the atmospheric, low-light environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway with parapet walls

events.description: Geralt draws his sword while walking forward
Geralt sheaths his sword and continues walking

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along an elevated stone walkway, briefly drawing and then sheathing his sword while maintaining forward momentum past stone parapets

entered.detail: Low stone wall running along the left side of the elevated walkway
Low stone wall running along the right side of the elevated walkway
Weathered wooden planks forming the surface of the elevated path
Dark tree line visible against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated stone walkway at night, with Geralt walking between low stone parapet walls on weathered wooden planks. The character briefly draws and sheaths his sword while maintaining a steady pace, with dark forest silhouettes visible in the distance against the teal night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path lined with stone walls and grass meadows

events.description: Transitions from elevated wooden walkway onto a dirt path at ground level
Light rain becomes visible as diagonal streaks in the air

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path, passing between low stone walls as light rain begins to fall and the landscape opens up

entered.detail: Winding dirt trail through the countryside with visible wheel ruts
Grassy field with wildflowers sloping downward from the path
Grassy embankment rising slightly on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the elevated walkway to a ground-level dirt path winding through open grasslands. Stone walls continue to line the path but recede to the mid-distance as light rain becomes visible against the dark sky, and the environment opens up to reveal meadows on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with distant mountain vistas

events.description: Stone walls disappear and landscape opens to reveal distant mountains and tower ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the winding dirt path through expansive grasslands with distant mountains and scattered trees visible on the horizon

entered.detail: Mountain range silhouetted against the teal night sky
Cluster of deciduous trees dotting the left side of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wide countryside with stone walls no longer visible. Geralt walks through expansive grasslands as distant mountains and scattered trees emerge on the horizon, with light rain continuing to fall through the atmospheric night lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to ruined stone tower and fortress walls

events.description: Path curves and approaches a prominent ruined stone tower rising from the landscape

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks toward a large ruined stone tower, the path curving slightly left as the structure looms larger and stone rubble appears along the trail

entered.detail: Tall cylindrical stone tower with broken upper sections and missing walls
Piles of broken stones and collapsed wall sections beside the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a significant ruined stone tower that dominates the view. The path curves slightly as Geralt nears the structure, with stone rubble and broken walls appearing alongside the trail. The distant mountains fade from view as the camera focuses on the historic stone ruins ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined, elevated walkway into an expansive, rain-swept rural landscape at night. It begins with Geralt walking along weathered wooden planks between low stone parapets, briefly drawing and sheathing his sword against a backdrop of dark forest silhouettes and a teal sky. As the camera maintains its steady pace, the elevated path descends and opens up into a ground-level dirt road winding through open grasslands. The scene then expands as the stone walls recede into the mid-distance, while light rain begins to fall across the darkening meadows that now stretch out on both sides of the path.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive, rain-swept countryside that gradually narrows its focus toward a looming ancient ruin. It begins as the path opens into wide grasslands, leaving the stone walls behind while distant mountains and scattered trees emerge on the horizon under atmospheric night lighting. As Geralt continues forward through the light rain, the open landscape begins to shift, and the distant peaks fade from view. The scene then closes in on a significant ruined stone tower that dominates the vista, with the path curving slightly to reveal stone rubble and broken walls lining the trail. Finally, the camera focuses entirely on the historic stone ruins as they rise ahead in the darkness.
